reasoning: The control AC-4(11) focuses on enforcing information flow policies, which in Kubernetes can be mapped to network security and data transport security. NetworkPolicies can enforce ingress and egress rules to control traffic flow between pods, effectively acting as security policy filters. Additionally, ensuring TLS is enabled for Ingress controllers and mutual TLS (mTLS) in service meshes like Istio or Linkerd can enforce secure communication channels, aligning with the control's requirement for secure information flow.
title: Information Flow Enforcement - Information flow enforcement | configuration of security or privacy policy filte
